message:
test(fcp-core): add ApprovalToken scope validation and binding tests (uek4)

Add 7 new tests for ApprovalToken verification:
- approval_token_elevation_validates_target_integrity
- approval_token_declassification_validates_zones
- approval_token_elevation_scope_binding_enforced
- approval_token_declassification_scope_object_binding
- approval_token_signature_field_presence
- approval_token_boundary_time_validity
- approval_token_zero_duration_is_never_valid

These tests verify:
- Elevation scope correctly specifies target integrity levels
- Declassification scope validates from_zone/to_zone correctly
- Scope binding enforcement (provenance_id/object_ids must match)
- Signature field presence and handling
- Time validity boundary conditions (inclusive start, exclusive end)
- Edge case: zero-duration tokens are never valid

Total tests: 559 (up from 552)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
